These are being used as a decorative tree in the parking lot, but the berries are great! Access: Public.

Six to seven trees along Norland Avenue side of the Target parking lot. Fruits typically ripen around June and look like blueberries. Easy to harvest those within reach & still leave most for the birds! Access: Public.

Three trees in front of Target Store entrance. Small to medium sized tree with smooth, spotty gray bark, multiple trunks on same tree. Prolific blueberry shaped/sized fruit with oval leaves. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-June.
Loads of crabapples in the Giant parking lot Access: Public.
